name: Chocolate Decadence Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate in a double boiler over hot water or microwave on medium for 2 to 3 minutes until melted and cool.
2. In a mixer, combine the cream cheese and sugar; mix until blended.
3. Add eggs and vanilla extract; mix until smooth.
4. Blend in the melted chocolate and sour cream.
5. Pour batter into a greased 9-inch springform pan.
6. Bake at 300°F for 35 minutes or until set around the edges and still glossy in the center.
7. Turn off the oven, leave the door slightly open, and let cool in the oven for 1 hour more.
8. Chill completely.
9. When ready to serve, remove the pan sides.
10. Prepare whipped cream topping by whipping cream until stiff peaks form, then beat in sugar, sour cream, and Kahlua.
11. Spoon the whipped cream around the top of the cheesecake and garnish with chocolate curls.
